---
title: "Topics"
description: "Browse PyMathon articles by topic and use the category filter to explore published work."
comments: false
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort: "date desc"
---

# Topics

Browse the ideas that PyMathon develops. The article filter below shows the categories available in published posts; this topic map will grow as new articles are added.

::: {.topic-grid}
::: {.topic-card}
## Algebra

Equations, identities, inequalities, and structural reasoning.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
## Calculus

Limits, derivatives, integrals, and their applications.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
## Coordinate Geometry

Lines, conics, loci, and geometric methods on the coordinate plane.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
## Combinatorics

Counting, arrangements, recurrences, and discrete structures.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
## Number Theory

Divisibility, congruences, primes, and integer patterns.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
## Python for Mathematics

Small programs that verify patterns, calculations, and examples.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
## Mathematical Visualisation

Graphs, diagrams, and dynamic ways to see an idea clearly.
:::
:::

## Articles by Category
